DOCS.json.role: Root document index for source-pipeline routing.
DOCS.json.read: at bootstrap or when document ownership is unclear

WORKFLOW.json.role: Root workflow guardrails and broad task policy.

COMMANDS.json.read: when a prompt matches a command keyword

FLOWS.json.read: after task classification and before broad edits

core/.read: when exact source-level behavior is needed

project/.read: when pack behavior or project type routing changes

templates/.read: when initialization or reinitialization behavior changes

docs-tech/.role: Source-pipeline technical indexes, caches, and knowledge views.
docs-tech/.read: when compiled context or knowledge routing changes

AI-compiled/.role: Generated read-optimized instruction and knowledge cache.
AI-compiled/.read: for fast orientation; do not edit by hand
